message: Update sync script to use ~/.agents instead of ~/.codex

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ ROOT_DIR=$(pwd -P)
 SKILLS_ROOT="$ROOT_DIR/skills"
 AGENTS_FILE="$ROOT_DIR/AGENTS.md"
 
-CODEX_HOME="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}"
+AGENTS_HOME="${AGENTS_HOME:-$HOME/.agents}"
 CLAUDE_HOME="${CLAUDE_HOME:-$HOME/.claude}"
 if [ ! -d "$CLAUDE_HOME" ] && [ -d "$HOME/claude" ]; then
   CLAUDE_HOME="$HOME/claude"
@@ -25,10 +25,10 @@ link () {
 # Link each skill directory
 for skill in "$SKILLS_ROOT"/*/; do
   skill_name=$(basename "$skill")
-  link "$skill" "$CODEX_HOME/skills/$skill_name"
+  link "$skill" "$AGENTS_HOME/skills/$skill_name"
   link "$skill" "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills/$skill_name"
 done
 
 # Link AGENTS.md
-link "$AGENTS_FILE" "$CODEX_HOME/AGENTS.md"
+link "$AGENTS_FILE" "$AGENTS_HOME/AGENTS.md"
 link "$AGENTS_FILE" "$CLAUDE_HOME/CLAUDE.md"
